name: Turtle Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 cup chocolate chips (I used milk chocolate)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, beat flour, sugar and butter on medium speed for 2-3 minutes.
2. Press firmly into an ungreased 13x9x2 inch baking pan.
3. Arrange pecans over the crust.
4. Combine butter and brown sugar in a heavy saucepan.
5. Bring to a boil; boil for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
6. Pour over pecans.
7. Bake at 350°F for 18-22 minutes.
8. Spread chocolate chips, allowing some to remain whole.
9. Cool completely.
10. Cut into small squares.
Yield: about 8 dozen.
